name: Notion
tagline: The AI workspace that works for you
description: Build custom agents, search across all your apps, and automate busywork. The AI workspace where teams get more done, faster.

name: Obsidian
tagline: The free and flexible app for your private thoughts
description: Obsidian is a powerful knowledge base that works on local plain-text Markdown files. It supports backlinks, graph views, and a rich plugin ecosystem for building your personal knowledge management system.

name: Figma
tagline: The collaborative interface design tool
description: Figma is a web-based design platform for UI/UX design, prototyping, and design systems. It enables real-time collaboration between designers, developers, and stakeholders with powerful vector editing and component libraries.

name: Penpot
tagline: The open-source design platform for teams building digital products at scale
description: Penpot is the open-source design platform for teams building digital products at scale, enabling deeper collaboration across design, code, and AI workflows.

name: Linear
tagline: The system for product development
description: Purpose-built for planning and building products with AI agents. Streamline issues, sprints, and product roadmaps.

name: GitHub Issues
tagline: Plan, track, and discuss work right where the code lives
description: GitHub Issues is a flexible tracking system built into GitHub, where over 150 million people build software.

name: Cursor
tagline: The best way to code with AI
description: Built to make you extraordinarily productive, Cursor is the best way to build software with AI. A code editor with native AI integration for pair-programming.

name: VS Code
tagline: AI-powered coding with GitHub Copilot
description: Visual Studio Code redefines AI-powered coding with GitHub Copilot for building and debugging modern web and cloud applications. Free and available on Linux, macOS, and Windows.

name: Slack
tagline: AI work platform for managing projects and automating workflows
description: Boost productivity and save time with Slack — the AI work platform for managing projects, automating workflows, and connecting teams securely.

name: Discord
tagline: Your place to play games, chill with friends, and build communities
description: Discord is great for playing games and chilling with friends, or even building a worldwide community. Customize your own space to talk, play, and hang out.

name: system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
tagline: A comprehensive open-source collection of system prompts and internal tools for popular AI coding assistants.
description: This repository aggregates system prompts, internal tools, and AI models from a wide range of AI-powered development tools like Cursor, Devin, Copilot, and many others. It serves as a resource for developers and AI enthusiasts to understand how these tools are configured and to potentially reuse or learn from the prompts.

features: Full access to all prompts and tools
Curated collection of system prompts from 25+ AI coding tools
Includes internal tools and AI model details

name: claude-code
tagline: An agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster through natural language commands.
description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that reads your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and integrates with your development tools. It is available in your terminal, IDE, desktop app, and browser, enabling developers to execute routine tasks, explain complex code, and handle git workflows through natural language commands.
features: Natural language code editing and command execution

name: markitdown
tagline: Convert various file formats to Markdown effortlessly with this Python tool.
description: MarkItDown is a Python tool by Microsoft for converting files and office documents to Markdown. It supports formats like PDF, Office documents, and integrates with AI frameworks like LangChain and OpenAI, making it ideal for developers and data scientists.
features: Converts PDF, Office documents, and other files to Markdown
Integrates with LangChain, OpenAI, and AutoGen
MIT licensed and actively maintained by Microsoft

name: deer-flow
tagline: Open-source framework for building long-horizon super agents that research, code, and create.
description: DeerFlow is an open-source framework by ByteDance for building super agents capable of handling complex, long-horizon tasks. It leverages sandboxes, memories, tools, skills, subagents, and a message gateway to automate research, coding, and content creation. Ideal for developers and researchers building advanced AI agent systems.

features: Full open-source code under MIT license
Long-horizon task handling from minutes to hours
Memory, tools, skills, and subagent orchestration
Built on LangChain and LangGraph for extensibility

name: awesome-claude-skills
tagline: A curated collection of Claude AI skills, resources, and tools for customizing workflows.
description: This repository is a curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools that help developers and AI enthusiasts customize Claude AI workflows. It includes integrations with various platforms like Composio, Cursor, and Gemini CLI, making it a valuable resource for building AI agents and automation.

features: Access to all listed resources and tools
Curated list of Claude Skills and resources
Covers integrations with multiple AI platforms

name: nanobot
tagline: Ultra-lightweight, self-hosted AI agent for automating tools, chats, and workflows.
description: nanobot is an open-source, ultra-lightweight personal AI agent that integrates with your tools, chats, and workflows. It supports self-hosting and long-running automation, making it ideal for developers and power users who want a customizable AI assistant.
features: Integrates with tools, chats, and workflows
Compatible with multiple LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)

name: Antigravity-Manager
tagline: One-click seamless account switching for Antigravity Tools, built with Tauri v2 and React.
description: Antigravity-Manager is a professional account manager and switcher designed for Antigravity Tools. It enables users to switch between accounts with a single click, streamlining workflow for those managing multiple accounts. Built with Tauri v2 and React (Rust), it offers a fast and secure desktop experience.

features: Full account management and switching capabilities
Built with Tauri v2 and React for performance

name: composio
tagline: Just-in-time tool calls, secure delegated auth, and sandboxed environments for AI agents
description: Just-in-time tool calls, secure delegated auth, sandboxed environments, and parallel execution across 1,000+ apps for AI agents.

name: claude-code-templates
tagline: The largest open-source collection of pre-built components for Claude Code.
description: Claude Code Templates is a CLI tool and repository that provides over 1000 pre-built agents, slash commands, MCP integrations, hooks, and settings for Claude Code. It is designed for developers using Anthropic's Claude Code to enhance their workflow with ready-to-use components. The tool is free, open-source, and actively maintained.
features: 1000+ pre-built components including agents, commands, and MCP integrations
CLI tool for easy installation and configuration
Active community with 27k+ stars on GitHub

name: Gerbil
tagline: Run large language models locally with a simple desktop app.
description: Gerbil is a desktop application that allows users to run large language models (LLMs) on their own machine, providing privacy and offline access. It is aimed at developers and AI enthusiasts who want to experiment with LLMs without relying on cloud services.
features: Local execution of large language models

name: Bodhi
tagline: Run open-source LLMs locally with OpenAI-compatible APIs.
description: Bodhi is a tool that allows users to run open-source and open-weight large language models locally on their own hardware, providing OpenAI-compatible APIs for easy integration. It is designed for developers and AI enthusiasts who want to leverage LLMs without relying on cloud services.
features: Local execution for privacy and control

name: Workout.cool
tagline: Open-source fitness coaching platform for personalized workout programs
description: Workout.cool is an open-source fitness coaching platform that creates personalized workout programs. While categorized under productivity, it is primarily a fitness and health tool.

features: Full access to all features as open-source software

name: AnkiAIUtils
tagline: AI-powered utilities to enhance Anki flashcards with explanations and mnemonics
description: AnkiAIUtils provides AI-powered tools to enhance Anki flashcards with explanations, mnemonics, illustrations, and adaptive learning. It is a companion to the Anki app, not the core Anki application itself.
features: Adaptive learning algorithms to optimize review schedules
Integration with Anki's existing card system

name: CodinIT,
tagline: Local-first open-source AI app builder for web and mobile.
description: CodinIT is a local-first, open-source AI app builder that enables developers to create web and mobile applications using natural language. It runs on MacOS, Windows, and Linux, prioritizing privacy and offline capabilities.
features: Local-first architecture for privacy and offline use
AI-powered app generation from natural language

name: Stagewise
tagline: The open source agentic IDE for creating and orchestrating coding agents with multi-model support.
description: Stagewise is an open source IDE that allows developers to create and orchestrate coding agents, preview apps, and run git workflows. It supports multiple AI models from various providers, making it a versatile tool for AI-assisted development.
features: App previews and git workflow integration
Support for multiple AI models across providers

name: Sgai
tagline: An AI-powered software factory that automates development workflows.
description: Sgai is an AI software factory by Sandgarden that helps developers automate repetitive coding tasks, generate boilerplate, and streamline project setup. It is designed for developers and teams looking to accelerate their development process with AI assistance.
features: AI-driven code generation and boilerplate creation
Support for multiple programming languages and frameworks

name: Dyad,
tagline: Flexible, local, open-source AI app builder with zero lock-in.
description: Dyad is an open-source AI app builder that allows users to build AI applications locally using their preferred AI models and tools. It emphasizes flexibility and local execution, avoiding vendor lock-in.

name: Tasker
tagline: AI-powered browser automation for everyone.
description: Tasker is a free, open-source desktop app that automates any website using AI. Users can record workflows or describe them in plain English, and the AI handles the rest. It's available for Windows, Mac, and Linux.
features: Record workflows or describe in plain English
